nasb.text: “He who receives you receives Me, and he who receives Me receives Him who sent Me.

esv.text: “Whoever receives you receives me, and     whoever receives me receives him who sent me.

cnv.text: “接待你們的，就是接待我；接待我的，就是接待那差我來的。

ccb.text: “人接待你们就是接待我，接待我就是接待差我来的那位。

csbs.text: “接受你们的，就是接受我；接受我的，就是接受差派我来的那一位。
